_comment: Reference MCP servers for Claude Code. Mirrors the five servers in opencode/.config/opencode/opencode.json. Tokens come from environment variables (NOTION_TOKEN, DOTMESH_GITHUB_PAT, TAVILY_API_KEY, etc.) and are not committed here. DOTMESH_GITHUB_PAT is deliberately named outside the GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN set so it does not override gh's keyring auth. Apply with: see docs/INSTALL.md.
